itinerary.title: Cusco
itinerary.description: Acclimatize at altitude. Explore colonial Cusco, San Pedro market, and Sacsayhuaman ruins.

itinerary.title: Sacred Valley
itinerary.description: Visit Ollantaytambo, Moray terraces, and Maras salt mines.

itinerary.title: Inca Trail
itinerary.description: Trek through cloud forests and ancient passes. Arrive at the Sun Gate for your first view of Machu Picchu.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Train back to Cusco and farewell dinner.

title: Peru: Inca Trail Expedition
description: Walk in the footsteps of the Incas on this epic trek to Machu Picchu. A blend of adventure, history, and Andean culture.
